response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified two distinct musical performances in the video via on-screen title cards at 00:13 ('Departures ~Anata ni Okuru Ai no Uta~') and 04:30 ('mumei').
2. The performer in both scenes is virtual character Nanashi Mumei.
3. Search strategy:
   - Searched for 'Departures ~Anata ni Okuru Ai no Uta~' using 'EGOIST' and Japanese/English lyrics keywords to identify the original source.
   - Searched for 'mumei' original song using 'TKN' and Japanese/English lyrics keywords.
4. Both searches successfully identified the songs and provided lyrics/translation snippets. JSON object constructed from this information.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual concert performance by Hololive English VTuber Nanashi Mumei, consisting of a cover of 'Departures ~Anata ni Okuru Ai no Uta~' followed by her original song 'mumei'.

scenes.description: Nanashi Mumei performs a cover of 'Departures ~Anata ni Okuru Ai no Uta~' on a virtual stage. Title appears at 00:13.
scenes.song_title: Departures ~Anata ni Okuru Ai no Uta~
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
もうあなたから愛されることも
必要とされることもない
そして私はこうして一人ぼっちで
あの時あなたはなんて言ったの？
届かない言葉は宙
想いをわかってるのに
今日もしてしまう
叶わぬ長いことを

離さないでギュッと
手を握り合って
あなたと二人
続くと言って
繋いだ
その手は温かくて
温かくて

優しかった

(Note: This is an excerpt representing the song's opening and chorus.)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Mou anata kara aisareru koto mo
Hitsuyou to sareru koto mo nai
Soshite watashi wa koushite hitoribocchi de
Ano toki anata wa nante itta no?
Todokanai kotoba wa jyuu
Omo o wakatteru no ni
Kyou mo shite shimau
Kanawanu nagai koto wo

Hanasanaide kyuu to
Te wo nigiriatte
Anata to futari
Tsuduku to itte
Tsunaita
Sono te wa atatakakute
Atatakakute

Yasashikatta

(Note: This is an excerpt representing the song's opening and chorus. Full lyrics are extensive.)

scenes.description: Nanashi Mumei performs her original song 'mumei' on a virtual stage. Title card appears at 04:30.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
忘れてしまった
ことだけを覚えている
ぽかりと空いた穴の先で
君と出会った
名前も顔もわからない君
なんだか懐かしいような気がした
互いに穴埋めていくように
ふざけあって
笑いあって

(Note: This is an excerpt representing the song's opening.)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I only remember the things I forgot
I met you on the other side of a gaping hole
You, whose name and face I do not know
For some reason, I felt a sense of nostalgia
As if we were filling each other's voids
We joked and laughed

(Note: This is an excerpt representing the song's opening. Full lyrics are available.)
